summary: Iteration 51: Quality Improvements Testing (7C, 7D, 7E + Giving Integrations). Backend: 19/19 tests pass (100%). All quality improvements verified: Shannon & Jacob attendance streaks (12-week), Member Directory (229 members with real names), Solomon Chat with live context, Giving Integrations scaffold (Solomon Pay, Pushpay, SecureGive). Frontend: Landing page, Login, Portal Directory all working. Giving Dashboard has loading issue in browser (CloudFlare challenge blocking API calls).

ui_bugs.issue: Page stuck on loading skeleton - API calls blocked by CloudFlare challenge in browser. APIs work correctly when called directly via curl.

integration_issues.issue: fetchGivingData and fetchIntegrations don't include auth headers, causing CloudFlare to block requests in browser context

7E_attendance_streaks.details: Shannon and Jacob both have 12-week attendance streaks seeded. Backend API /api/portal/attendance/streak returns current_streak >= 8 and longest_streak >= 12 for both users.

7C_member_directory.details: GET /api/portal/directory returns 229 members with actual names (not empty). Search functionality works. Frontend Portal Directory page shows members with names, emails, membership status badges, and group tags.

7D_solomon_chat_context.details: POST /api/solomon/chat returns contextual responses referencing live church data (member count, events, giving). get_church_context() function injects real-time data including membership stats, upcoming events, announcements, service plans, and groups.

giving_integrations.details: GET /api/admin/giving/integrations returns processor config with Solomon Pay, Pushpay, SecureGive. POST /connect switches active processor. POST /disconnect deactivates. Invalid processor rejected with 400. All MOCKED - no real payment processor connections.

login_flow.details: Shannon (shannonnieman1030@gmail.com) and Jacob (jacobpacheco@abundanteast.com) can log in with Demo2026! and access admin features. Platform admin and member logins also work.

no_regression.details: Landing page (/) loads with hero section, Login page (/login) loads with 'Your church. Elevated.' tagline, Signup (/signup) accessible. Health endpoint returns status: ok.

action_items: MEDIUM: GivingDashboard.jsx - Add auth headers to fetchGivingData and fetchIntegrations API calls to prevent CloudFlare blocking in browser context
critical_code_review_comments: All quality improvements (7C, 7D, 7E) implemented correctly and verified via backend tests
Giving integrations scaffold is MOCKED - connect/disconnect simulates processor switching without real payment provider integration
Portal Directory shows 229 members with real names, search works correctly
Solomon Chat injects live church context including membership stats, events, announcements, service plans, and groups
Attendance streaks seeded correctly for Shannon and Jacob (12 consecutive Sundays)

success_rate.frontend: 80% (Landing, Login, Directory work; Giving Dashboard has loading issue)

seed_data_creation: Attendance streaks seeded for Shannon & Jacob (12-week streaks). 25+ directory members seeded with realistic names.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 verified all quality improvements: 7E (attendance streaks for Shannon/Jacob - 12 weeks), 7C (member directory with 229 members), 7D (Solomon Chat with live church context), and Giving Integrations scaffold (MOCKED). Backend APIs all working correctly. Frontend Giving Dashboard has a loading issue due to CloudFlare challenge blocking API calls in browser - the APIs work fine when called directly. Portal Directory UI works great showing 229 members with real names and search functionality.

mocked_apis_list: Giving integrations connect/disconnect (simulated processor connection - no real Pushpay/SecureGive/Stripe)
Solomon Chat uses real Anthropic Claude via Emergent LLM Key
